KeysToEntries.TrackingTag_SmallGpsTag_Description: A basic tracking tag that allows the owner to monitor their property's location for a short amount of time.
KeysToEntries.TrackingTag_GpsTag_Description: A tracking tag that allows the owner to monitor their property's location for a moderate amount of time.
KeysToEntries.TrackingTag_AdvancedGpsTag_Description: An advanced tracking tag that allows the owner to monitor their property's location for an extended period of time.
